devotionals.title: Faith That Moves Mountains
devotionals.text: If ye have faith as a grain of mustard seed, ye shall say unto this mountain, Remove hence to yonder place; and it shall remove; and nothing shall be impossible unto you.
devotionals.devotional: Jesus taught that even the smallest amount of genuine faith can accomplish great things. You don't need enormous faith—just faith in an enormous God. Place your trust in Him today, and watch what He can do through you.
devotionals.prayer: Lord, give me mustard seed faith. Help me to trust You for the impossible. In Jesus' name, Amen.

devotionals.title: The Lord Fights For You
devotionals.text: The LORD shall fight for you, and ye shall hold your peace.
devotionals.devotional: When facing battles you cannot win alone, remember: God fights for His people. Your job is to be still and trust Him. Stop trying to fight in your own strength and let the Lord be your defender.
devotionals.prayer: Father, I trust You to fight my battles. I will be still and know that You are God. In Jesus' name, Amen.

devotionals.title: Streams in the Desert
devotionals.text: Behold, I will do a new thing; now it shall spring forth; shall ye not know it? I will even make a way in the wilderness, and rivers in the desert.
devotionals.devotional: God specializes in doing new things in barren places. When you feel like you're in a wilderness, remember—God makes rivers in deserts. He brings life to dead places. Expect Him to do something new today.
devotionals.prayer: Lord, do a new thing in my life. Bring streams to my desert places. I trust You to make a way. Amen.

devotionals.title: No Weapon Formed
devotionals.text: No weapon that is formed against thee shall prosper; and every tongue that shall rise against thee in judgment thou shalt condemn.
devotionals.devotional: This is the heritage of the servants of the Lord. Weapons may form, but they will not succeed. Words may accuse, but they will not stand. Your protection is not in your strength but in your servanthood to God.
devotionals.prayer: Father, thank You for Your protection. No weapon formed against me shall prosper. I trust in Your promise. Amen.

devotionals.title: Delight Yourself in the Lord
devotionals.text: Delight thyself also in the LORD; and he shall give thee the desires of thine heart.
devotionals.devotional: Don't pursue your desires first—pursue the Lord first. When He becomes your delight, your desires align with His will. He either gives you what you want, or changes what you want to match His best for you.
devotionals.prayer: Lord, You are my delight. Align my desires with Your will. I trust You with the longings of my heart. Amen.
